summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of C&C Property Cleaning landing page. All critical functionality verified including page load, navigation, CTAs, accordions, content accuracy, and responsive design. Page is production-ready.
passed_tests: Page loads without runtime errors at https://cc-property-clean.preview.emergentagent.com
Header brand, Services tab, About Me tab visible and functional
Header call button (tel:6314017026) and Book button (placeholder Google Form) working
Hero section displays correct heading with Long Island messaging
Service area notice 'Operated only on Long Island, New York' visible
Hero CTAs (call, book consultation, email) all functional
Call links use correct tel:6314017026 format
Book consultation links use placeholder Google Form URL and open externally
Email links open Gmail compose with placeholder@example.com prefilled
Before/after gallery displays 4 images with proper Before/After labels
All 5 service accordions present: garbage cans, fences, driveways, wooden decks, custom inquiries
Each service accordion expands and displays image and content
Garbage cans accordion shows exact pricing text: '$10 per garbage can' for first time, '$15 per garbage can' after
Water supply notice visible and bold: '*Customer must provide access to water supply if required'
About Me section displays exact text: 'Carlo and Collin, cousins from Holtsville, wanting to make your property as clean as theirs'
Why choose us accordion expands and contains required text about maintaining parents property
Long Island only service notice visible in multiple locations
Mobile responsive CTA bar appears on narrow viewport (390px width)
Mobile call and book buttons functional with correct hrefs
Navigation tabs scroll to correct sections (Services and About Me)
All 8 images loaded successfully without 404 errors
No severe console errors detected
Design follows specifications: green/blue/white color scheme, Space Grotesk headings, IBM Plex Sans body
Subtle gradient used only in hero section (follows design guidelines)
Layout is clean and not bulky as requested
